title: taraxacum lacianense
intro: Taraxacum lacianense, also known as the Albanian dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion genus. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum lacianense include its ability to improve digestion, reduce blood pressure, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in Albania and other parts of the Balkans.
